attributes.name: manageActiveState
attributes.description: when wants to manage active state of the button

attributes.name: actions
attributes.description: When true, it shows default CRUD Buttons

attributes.name: thClass
attributes.description: classes prop for th and td.

attributes.name: responsive
attributes.description: When set to true, the table becomes responsive. Wraps in .table-responsive

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Minimum value for the progress bar

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum value for the progress bar

attributes.name: showValue
attributes.description: Whether to show the progress value as text

attributes.name: striped
attributes.description: Whether to apply striped styling to the progress bar

attributes.name: animated
attributes.description:
Whether to animate the striped progress bar
Only effective when striped is true

attributes.name: barTag
attributes.description: HTML tag to use for the progress bar container element

attributes.name: height
attributes.description:
Height of the progress container
Can be a number (pixels) or a CSS string value

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Minimum value for the progress bar

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum value for the progress bar

attributes.name: showValue
attributes.description: Whether to show the progress value as text

attributes.name: striped
attributes.description: Whether to apply striped styling to the progress bar

attributes.name: animated
attributes.description:
Whether to animate the striped progress bar
Only effective when striped is true

attributes.name: grow
attributes.description: Whether to use the grow animation instead of border animation

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Size variant for the spinner
Can be 'sm' for small or 'lg' for large
